This amazing announcement was
made last night at the meeting of the
city council by II. M. Stephens, at
torney for the Washington Water
Power company and the Spokesman
Review.


Mr.. Stephens statement was greet
ed with jeers and laughter by the
large crowd which had assembled In
the council chamber to witness the
fight between the Spokane Traction
company and the big monopoly which
claims this section of the earth, in
Guiding the free elements, air and
water.


"Oh you may laugh If you want
to-" said Mr.. Stephens to the crowd,
but I am telling you the truth, and
every good lawyer knows ii. We
could stop the people taking this
If we appealed to the courts its use
would be enjoined.


Il tell you the Washington Water
Power company has treated you fair
ly," Numbered the attorney as final
rebuke to the jeering crowd.


Then Mr. Stephens told how his
company proposed to aid manufacture
ing in Spokane and add to it's rapid
growth.


where else can manufacturers Sc
cure power at SO per horse power?"
said he. Il put this question today
20, 20, l.
ing arrangements to locate in this
city. He said it was too bad that
the Washington Water Power com
pany has a cinch on this magnificent
water power.
